llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Process engineer
job.description: About The Role Provide support to process engineering and technology transfer topics in India Prepare a comprehensive engineering package for process development and scale-up topics in India pertaining to batch processes Continuously support the production to optimize plant performance and output Support process engineering research lab development activities and innovation activities for OD-specific needs How Will You Do It Act as the “Focal point” of process engineering research in India to connect with ODs and expert teams globally, to provide solutions accordingly by leveraging process engineering expertise resources Self-dependent execution, or participation of complex research and operation support projects that requires specific expertise in process engineering Provide continuous support to the lab scale process development activities and develop a strategy for the scale-up based on the process requirements and constraints Build-up stronger competencies downstream unit operations for batch processes (distillation, filtration, crystallization, drying etc.) in India to bridge the gap between lab and production scale Closely work with the ODs and external contract manufacturing partners to develop a process package for effective tech transfer and operational ease Provide continuous support for troubleshooting, operational issues and process optimization during and after the tech transfer Identify and evaluate new contract manufacturing partners for various applications from different ODs in India Independently identify and execute topics focusing on operation cost reduction for plants Critically evaluate and interpret the process data to give recommendations about improvements Comprehensively develop technical concepts for new processes, including mass balance, PFD, simulations, engineering calculations and design of equipment Strictly follow the legal, information protection and EHS compliance regulations What Are We Looking For Edu c a t i o n: Masters in Chemical Engineering or related W o r k in g Experience 1-5 years experience in the domain of process engineering and/or batch processes and/or technology transfer, process scale-up, process development and optimization for downstream operations. T e c hn i c a l Professional Knowledge: Experience with process simulation and modelling of distillation units, heat exchangers, filters, crystallizers etc. Experience of working on process development, technology transfer and scale-up topics is...
